Activity Rules
Earn through Deposits, Trading, and Invitations:
Over 12 weeks, we're allocating airdrops weekly. Participants share this pool based on their points, calculated weekly. Trading 10 USDC earns 1 point, and maintaining an average margin of 2 USDC in your perpetual account, 1000x account, or bot account also earns 1 point. Inviters receive rewards equal to 10% of their invitees' points.Claim
Warpcast Users Airdrop:
Warpcast users who follow JOJO's Warpcast and JOJO's channel are eligible for the airdrop.Claim
JOJO Bizarre Adventure Airdrop:
JOJO Bizarre Adventure Airdrop is now available for claiming.Claim
DODO Users Airdrop:
For the DODO users Airdrop, please click here to claim.Claim
If you have any questions about the airdrop calculations, please visit the [Support] Channel of our Discord at the bottom right of the page.
Learn more about the rules
